reviews.review_title: Great free title. More to come?
reviews.review_description: Its short but fun. Graphics are very nice. Hopefully this is just meant as a demo and there will be more to come.

developer_response.body: Thank for your support! Yes. It is a demo currently. We're planning to extend the contents. More stages, mechanics, weapons, enemies, items and interactions.

reviews.review_description: I had this game awhile never played it,  until I heard in a review that it was a roguelike.  I'm a sucker for a good roguelike so I'm back, and its alot of fun.

great game reminds of of space pirate trainer which is one of my favourite games this one is just as good will be sending a lot of time with this love it.if the Devs see this make more shooters like this I need more arcade shooters

The most fun I’ve had playing a shooter in VR. And it’s in space!! I love it, it’s nearly impossible to not love this game! Just shoot! Not too much strategy to worry about. ￼You’re on a platform and all around you is decorated space. You protect yourself from incoming rockets and you gain new weapons and upgrades. You can start with two weapons, or one weapon and a energy shield. I met my first “boss enemy“ at level 10. It really is a blast!!￼ ￼The one feature that I wish the game had is a save feature. You can make it to level 15, and if you die you’re going to start all the way back at level one. ￼Thankfully the levels are not long. ￼￼Edit:￼ I had to revisit my initial review. I was too hasty and It just didn’t do the game justice ￼.

It’s a bit challenging at first with leading moving targets, but it becomes addictive. The soundtrack is terrific and adds a great vibe to the game! 

You’ll see that the developers took great care with the details. ￼ And I’ll be paying attention to see what they come up with next!￼

developer_response.body: Thanks for your reviews! Your support is our greatest encouragement.

reviews.review_description: Reply from devs and Doh! I didn’t notice there was an update,  classic is where the fun is! Pure rouge like type game that I liked!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your update on the game rating. We value every player's opinion, which is why we added a new mode to the full release. As a Power Force existing player, you do not need to pay for the full version of the game, so just choose the mode you like and have some fun. Thanks for your feedback again. And here is the Discord invite: https://discord.gg/P2bRHCJ5wj

reviews.review_description:
Simple Shooter that is fun to play despite being very basic. Its got power ups to mix it up and several enemy types. Overall this is one of those games you download and play for 10 to 20 mins when your bored and you need a quick fix. If it cost money I would probably not recommend it but as something that is free its definitely worth checking out.

Video - https://youtu.be/b98dVZ82IKs

developer_response.body: Thank for your kind review! To be honest, one of our team members is your follower on Twitter. So she was really excited when she saw your ID in the reviews!

reviews.review_title: A Couple of Suggestions for Dev

developer_response.body: Nice suggestions! Some of the ideas are already in our plans and some of them really give us inspirations!

reviews.review_description:
Basic shooter game. Stand in one place and WAIT for the enemy to show up.  Very repetitive and has so many glitches.  The look in space is great, but the game gets boring fast.  I'm not sure if there are only 6 levels or if it was a glitch because it ran out of time but I continued playing for a long time after that.  

Sometimes after shooting the enemy, it can take up to 10 seconds for another enemy to show up and continue the fight.  That's great for running out the countdown clock but makes the game drag on.  

Need to add more and different enemies to make this game more interesting and worth the cost.  (Which was free)

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for your review!
Actually your feedback makes a lot of sense, and we've also received similar feedback before, that's why we've already optimized many of them.
Based on the information you provided, including "Maximum 6 levels", "countdown"
we think you might have downloaded the previous version, that's why those problems still occur. In our updated roguelite version, we've made a lot of optimizations, including 3 levels difficulties, each has 11 stages, with more types of enemies, props and bosses.
If you are interested to see how we've optimized the game, we hope you can try again and share your advice with us. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: My refferal link for %25 off(No spaces) :h t t p s://w w w.o c u l u s.c o m/a p p r e f e r r a l s/M r K r y s t a l/3786510441434821/?utm_source=2
You are a floating gun that just spew bullets and no more. This is a very basic shooter with no features or gimmick. The shooting gallery in  oculus first step does this better.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Power Force! It is a demo currently. We're planning to extend the contents and game mechanics. Please review again after we complete Power Force. :)

reviews.review_description: But then its just the same thing. I enjoyed the game on the first playthrough but then its just upgrades

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Power Force! We're planning to extend the contents like more weapons or different kind of shotting experience in later stages. There will be more updates. Please keep following us ;)

reviews.review_title: Best shooting game for casual players
reviews.review_description: If you're casual shooting player, this game is made for you. No mess operation and instant entertainment in a session. I like the most of the game is it provides multiple weapons and "bullet time". Although the enemy are ok, but from my point of view, this game really plays very well function on its place. So if you're professional shooting gamer, it could be difficult to satisfy you. : )

developer_response.body: Thank you for the nice review. It really makes us happy that you enjoyed it. There will be more updates. Please keep following us ;)

reviews.review_description: This game makes me recall the early years when I played Raiden. The idea of aerospace war is always one of my favorites. This game still seems a demo with a lot of weapons, scenarios, and aircrafts to be added, but the experience it creates is already thrilling. I mean, it feels just right when you put on your VR headset and find yourself in the space and firing at aircrafts from everywhere. I especially love the machine gun, which gives you great joy with the graphics and sound effects. I keep shooting the machine gun even when there is no enemy. Hope there can be new updates soon!

developer_response.body: It's really glad that Power Force remind you some good old memories. It's indeed a demo now. But we're adding some more things. The new updates will be coming soon!

reviews.review_title: Lots of fun and I totally love it
reviews.review_description:
I love this game and although I don’t get to play with it as often as I wish I could, whenever I do, I always find myself having a blast playing this game. It also helps that it’s not too difficult but still challenging enough at the same time to have lots of fun without the unnecessary frustration of not being able to progress to the next level which I really welcome because that allows me to just get lost in the game to my heart’s desire and I’m never disappointed on how much fun I have playing it. I guess that’s why I always find myself coming back every so often just having fun shooting at everything and just focus on how much fun I’m having playing that I really don’t even pay attention to my score only that I can play continuously until I literally get tired of shooting. 🤣

I can’t thank the devs enough for all their hard work and exceptional creativity in developing this incredibly amazing fun game and generously making it available for free for everyone to enjoy. Thank you so much devs for bringing so much fun to all those who’s lucky enough to play your game and wish you all continued success. 🥂

I'm not a big shooter game fan unless I'm shooting something that does not resemble real animals or people. So this one works very well for me! I'm a horrible shot but I thoroughly enjoy this game!!!! I have not advanced far enough to acquire a 3rd type of gun, but nonetheless, I'm still having a blast. Not giving 5 stars yet since I've not gone far enough to provide an accurate 5 star rating.

I also have an issue in that if I play and then leave the game, I cannot restart it.  When I go back in, I cannot select anything as I have no lasers with which to make my choices.  So I have to uninstall and reinstall in order to play. This is why I removed another star to give it a 3 star rating.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your feedback! We have fixed this bug, you can try to log in to the game, we will continue to improve the game experience.

reviews.review_title: Please Be A Full Game Soon 😭
reviews.review_description: Even as a demo this is so good. The end boss is really tough cause the shield is so low and the amount of small enemies is overwhelming. Not in a bad way though, mostly saying that because some reviewers say its too basic and i bet they never made it past Wave 4.

developer_response.body: We're planning the future version now! Soon the development will start again. Also we will adjust the difficulty curve. Thank for your opinion and support!

reviews.review_title: If this didn't freeze every 10 min
reviews.review_description: If this didn't freeze every ten minutes and reset my progress, it would be at least a 4/5. I can't give it more than a 1, since it's unplayable and a waste of time.

developer_response.body:
Sorry that our game give you a bad experience :(
We will try our best to optimize it and make the game runs fluently!

reviews.review_title: This is a FREE GEM for Quest 2
reviews.review_description: Dual guns, evade bullets with my own headset motion, power ups, and did I mention this is FREE? I will PAY for this game. Wish the devs can make more stages and boss, I will pay USD29.99 for this game for more content!!!
This game is fun.

2021 10 09 - Great Arcade Style Shooter.

I had a lot of fun as I blasted through the game 3 times in a row.

The first playthrough was a little tricky as I only had pistols and had to learn as I went. After that, it was a fairly easy (but still fun and engaging) game.

I started on easy and then you get money for better weapons and upgrades to them for your second playthrough. So by the time I played hard I was rocking some serious firepower.

All around a fun and engaging experience that will initially (first few levels) seem like a joke it is so easy, but will quickly have you bouncing around the living room as an intense amount of projectiles head your way. Best to just kill everything before they can shoot!

I eventually found that by slowly moving left to right, then ducking under incoming fire, and moving slowly back right worked well. Of course, just repeat that move back and forth and you can avoid almost all incoming missiles unless you really let the screen fill with baddies. Don't do that!

After a month and a half of trying everything free that looks even halfway decent on Oculus Quest 2 I feel I can confidently say this is one of the better-made games, it's fun, it's engaging, and it is well worth trying out. I hope this continues to get expanded on.

developer_response.body: We are very honored that you gave us such an incredible comment. Now we feel much more confident ;) Please keep following Power Force. There will be more updates and optimizations!
